title: Compass
description: A web application that functions as a digital compass, allowing users to determine their orientation relative to the Earth's magnetic field. The application can utilize the device's built-in magnetometer (if available) to provide real-time compass readings. It can also include features such as a visual compass interface, the ability to calibrate the compass for improved accuracy, and options to display the compass in different styles or themes. This project can be particularly useful for outdoor enthusiasts, travelers, or anyone interested in navigation.
tech: Web APIs for accessing magnetometer data (if available)
Local Storage for saving calibration data and user preferences
